text: I eat breakfast every day. / Im eating breakfast right now.
meaning: 我每天吃早餐。/ 我正在吃早餐。
description: 习惯vs此刻：每天 vs 现在。
examples_json: [{"en":"I eat lunch at noon. / Im eating lunch right now.","zh":"我中午吃午饭。/ 我正在吃午饭。"}]

text: I drink coffee in the morning. / Im drinking coffee right now.
meaning: 我早上喝咖啡。/ 我正在喝咖啡。
description: 习惯vs此刻：早上习惯 vs 现在。
examples_json: [{"en":"I drink water after exercise. / Im drinking water now.","zh":"我运动后喝水。/ 我正在喝水。"}]

text: I read books at night. / Im reading a great book.
meaning: 我晚上看书。/ 我正在读一本好书。
description: 习惯vs此刻：每晚 vs 此刻。
examples_json: [{"en":"I read news in the morning. / Im reading an interesting article.","zh":"我早上看新闻。/ 我正在读一篇有趣的文章。"}]

text: I cook dinner at home. / Im cooking pasta right now.
meaning: 我在家做晚饭。/ 我正在煮意面。
description: 习惯vs此刻：在家做饭 vs 此刻。
examples_json: [{"en":"I cook on weekends. / Im cooking soup right now.","zh":"我周末做饭。/ 我正在煮汤。"}]

text: I study English every day. / Im studying for a test now.
meaning: 我每天学英语。/ 我正在备考。
description: 习惯vs此刻：每天学 vs 此刻。
examples_json: [{"en":"I study in the library. / Im studying for an exam now.","zh":"我在图书馆学习。/ 我正在备考。"}]

text: It rains a lot in summer. / Its raining outside right now.
meaning: 夏天多雨。/ 外面正在下雨。
description: 季节特征 vs 此刻天气。
examples_json: [{"en":"It rains in spring. / Its raining heavily now.","zh":"春天多雨。/ 现在正在下大雨。"}]

text: People wait for the bus here. / People are waiting in line.
meaning: 人们在这等公交。/ 人们正在排队。
description: 一般情况 vs 眼前场景。
examples_json: [{"en":"People wait here every day. / People are waiting for the doors to open.","zh":"人们每天在这等。/ 人们正在等开门。"}]

text: He works in an office. / Hes working from home today.
meaning: 他在办公室工作。/ 他今天在家办公。
examples_json: [{"en":"He works in a hospital. / Hes working from home this week.","zh":"他在医院工作。/ 他这周在家办公。"}]

text: He drives to work every day. / Hes driving to the airport now.
meaning: 他每天开车上班。/ 他正开往机场。
examples_json: [{"en":"He drives to school. / Hes driving to the station now.","zh":"他开车上学。/ 他正开往车站。"}]

text: She teaches English. / Shes teaching a class right now.
meaning: 她教英语。/ 她正在上课。
examples_json: [{"en":"She teaches math. / Shes teaching a lesson right now.","zh":"她教数学。/ 她正在上课。"}]

text: She writes reports at work. / Shes writing an email now.
meaning: 她上班写报告。/ 她正在写邮件。
examples_json: [{"en":"She writes articles. / Shes writing a report now.","zh":"她写文章。/ 她正在写报告。"}]

text: The sun rises in the east. / The sun is shining today!
meaning: 太阳东升。/ 今天阳光明媚！
examples_json: [{"en":"The sun sets in the west. / The sun is shining brightly.","zh":"太阳西落。/ 阳光灿烂。"}]

text: He looks happy in photos. / Hes looking at his phone.
meaning: 他照片里看起来开心。/ 他正在看手机。
description: look(看起来) vs look at(看)对比。
examples_json: [{"en":"She looks tired. / Shes looking at the menu.","zh":"她看起来累了。/ 她正在看菜单。"}]

text: She thinks its a good idea. / Shes thinking about the problem.
meaning: 她觉得是好主意。/ 她正在思考问题。
description: think(认为) vs think about(思考)对比。
examples_json: [{"en":"I think you are right. / Im thinking about your question.","zh":"我觉得你是对的。/ 我正在想你的问题。"}]

text: I usually watch TV after dinner. / But right now Im watching a movie.
meaning: 我通常晚饭后看电视。/ 但我此刻在看电影。
description: 平时习惯 vs 此刻例外。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually read before bed. / But right now Im reading a magazine.","zh":"我通常睡前看书。/ 但我此刻在看杂志。"}]

text: I live in Beijing. / Im staying in Shanghai this week.
meaning: 我住在北京。/ 我这周待在上海。
description: 长期居住 vs 临时停留。
examples_json: [{"en":"I live in London. / Im staying in New York this month.","zh":"我住在伦敦。/ 我这个月待在纽约。"}]

text: I usually take the bus. / Im taking a taxi today.
meaning: 我通常坐公交。/ 我今天打车。
description: 习惯交通 vs 今天例外。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually ride a bike. / Im taking the subway today.","zh":"我通常骑自行车。/ 我今天坐地铁。"}]

text: We usually eat at home. / Were eating out tonight.
meaning: 我们通常在家吃。/ 我们今晚出去吃。
description: 习惯 vs 今晚例外。
examples_json: [{"en":"We usually cook. / Were ordering pizza tonight.","zh":"我们通常自己做饭。/ 我们今晚叫披萨。"}]

text: She wears a uniform at work. / Shes wearing a dress today.
meaning: 她上班穿制服。/ 她今天穿了裙子。
description: 常态穿着 vs 今日例外。
examples_json: [{"en":"He wears a suit. / Hes wearing a T-shirt today.","zh":"他穿西装。/ 他今天穿了T恤。"}]

text: He usually gets up at 7. / Hes getting up at 5 tomorrow.
meaning: 他通常7点起。/ 他明天5点起。
description: 习惯 vs 明天例外。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually get up at 6. / Im getting up at 8 tomorrow.","zh":"我通常6点起。/ 我明天8点起。"}]

text: They usually meet on Fridays. / Theyre meeting on Thursday this week.
meaning: 他们通常周五见。/ 这周改周四见。
description: 习惯时间 vs 本周调整。
examples_json: [{"en":"We usually meet on Mondays. / Were meeting on Tuesday this week.","zh":"我们通常周一见。/ 这周改周二见。"}]

text: I normally walk to school. / Im riding a bike this month.
meaning: 我平时走路去学校。/ 这个月我骑自行车。
description: 常态 vs 本月临时。
examples_json: [{"en":"I normally drive to work. / Im taking the bus this month.","zh":"我平时开车上班。/ 这个月我坐公交。"}]

text: It rains a lot in spring. / Its raining right now.
meaning: 春天雨水多。/ 现在正在下雨。
description: 季节特征 vs 此刻。
examples_json: [{"en":"It snows in winter. / Its snowing right now.","zh":"冬天下雪。/ 现在正在下雪。"}]

text: It gets dark early in winter. / Its getting dark. Lets go inside.
meaning: 冬天黑得早。/ 天快黑了，进去吧。
description: 季节规律 vs 此刻变化。
examples_json: [{"en":"It gets dark at 6. / Its getting dark now.","zh":"6点天黑。/ 天快黑了。"}]

text: I feel tired after work. / Im feeling really tired now.
meaning: 我下班后觉得累。/ 我现在好累。
description: 常态感受 vs 此刻感受。
examples_json: [{"en":"I feel hungry at noon. / Im feeling hungry now.","zh":"我中午觉得饿。/ 我现在饿了。"}]

text: The baby sleeps a lot. / The baby is sleeping now.
meaning: 宝宝睡很多。/ 宝宝正在睡觉。
examples_json: [{"en":"The cat sleeps all day. / The cat is sleeping on the sofa.","zh":"猫整天睡觉。/ 猫正在沙发上睡觉。"}]

text: I have a headache sometimes. / I have a headache right now.
meaning: 我有时头疼。/ 我现在头疼。
description: 有时 vs 此刻（have不用进行时）。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a cold sometimes. / I have a cold right now.","zh":"我有时感冒。/ 我现在感冒了。"}]

category: I think she is a good teacher
text: I think she is a good teacher. / Right now Im thinking about the lesson.
meaning: 我觉得她是好老师。/ 我正在想这节课。
description: think(认为) vs think about(思考)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I think he is nice. / Im thinking about his offer.","zh":"我觉得他不错。/ 我正在考虑他的提议。"}]

text: I usually work in Beijing. / But this week Im working in Shanghai.
meaning: 我通常在北京工作。/ 但这周我在上海。
description: 长期地点 vs 本周临时。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually work in the office. / But this week Im working at home.","zh":"我通常在办公室工作。/ 但这周我在家工作。"}]

text: I always get up at 7.
meaning: 我总是7点起床。
examples_json: [{"en":"I always drink water in the morning.","zh":"我早上总是喝水。"}]

text: I usually drink coffee in the morning.
meaning: 我通常早上喝咖啡。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually eat toast for breakfast.","zh":"我通常早餐吃吐司。"}]

text: I often read before bed.
meaning: 我经常睡前看书。
examples_json: [{"en":"I often exercise after work.","zh":"我经常下班后运动。"}]

text: I sometimes watch TV after work.
meaning: 我有时下班后看电视。
examples_json: [{"en":"I sometimes go for a walk after dinner.","zh":"我有时晚饭后散步。"}]

text: I rarely eat junk food.
meaning: 我很少吃垃圾食品。
examples_json: [{"en":"I rarely drink soda.","zh":"我很少喝汽水。"}]

text: I never smoke.
meaning: 我从不抽烟。
examples_json: [{"en":"I never eat meat.","zh":"我从不吃肉。"}]

text: She is always late for class.
meaning: 她上课总是迟到。
examples_json: [{"en":"She is always happy.","zh":"她总是很开心。"}]

text: He is never tired in the morning.
meaning: 他早上从不疲倦。
examples_json: [{"en":"He is never late.","zh":"他从不迟到。"}]

category: I usually work in Beijing but
text: I usually work in Beijing, but this week Im working in Shanghai.
meaning: 我通常在北京工作，但这周我在上海工作。
description: 习惯(现在时) vs 临时(进行时)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually work in the office, but this week Im working at home.","zh":"我通常在办公室工作，但这周在家办公。"}]

text: She is a teacher, but today she is learning English herself.
meaning: 她是老师，但今天她自己在学英语。
description: 身份(现在时) vs 此刻动作(进行时)。
examples_json: [{"en":"He is a chef, but today he is learning to bake.","zh":"他是厨师，但今天他在学烘焙。"}]

text: Right now Im cooking, and my sister is setting the table.
meaning: 现在我正在做饭，我妹妹在摆桌子。
examples_json: [{"en":"Right now Im working, and my colleague is helping me.","zh":"现在我在工作，我同事在帮我。"}]

text: I think he is sleeping. He usually takes a nap at this time.
meaning: 我觉得他在睡觉。他通常这个时间午休。
description: think(状态) + 推测 + 习惯。
examples_json: [{"en":"I think she is studying. She usually studies at this time.","zh":"我觉得她在学习。她通常这个时间学习。"}]

category: I usually walk to work but
text: I usually walk to work, but this month Im taking the bus.
meaning: 我通常走路上班，但这个月我坐公交。
description: 频率副词 + 但 + 进行时例外。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually cook at home, but this week Im eating out.","zh":"我通常在家做饭，但这周在外面吃。"}]

text: How often do you exercise? -- I usually go running three times a week.
meaning: 你多久运动一次？——我通常每周跑三次。
examples_json: [{"en":"How often do you read? -- I read every day.","zh":"你多久读一次书？——我每天读。"}]

text: I have a car.
meaning: 我有一辆车。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a bike.","zh":"我有一辆自行车。"}]

text: I have two brothers.
meaning: 我有两个兄弟。
examples_json: [{"en":"She has a sister.","zh":"她有一个妹妹。"}]

text: I have a headache.
meaning: 我头疼。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a cold.","zh":"我感冒了。"}]

text: She has blue eyes.
meaning: 她有蓝眼睛。
examples_json: [{"en":"He has brown hair.","zh":"他有棕色头发。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I have lunch at 12. / Im having lunch now.","zh":"我12点吃午餐。/ 我正在吃午餐。"}]

text: She has a lot of work. / Shes having a busy week.
meaning: 她有很多工作。/ 她这周很忙。
examples_json: [{"en":"He has many tasks. / Hes having a hard month.","zh":"他有很多任务。/ 他这个月很难。"}]

meaning: 我每天7点起。/ 我正在起床。
examples_json: [{"en":"I get up at 6 on weekdays. / Im getting up now.","zh":"我工作日6点起。/ 我正在起床。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I get home at 5. / Im getting home now.","zh":"我5点到家。/ 我快到家了。"}]

meaning: 我容易累。/ 我有点累了，休息吧。
examples_json: [{"en":"I get hungry easily. / Im getting hungry. Lets eat.","zh":"我容易饿。/ 我饿了，吃吧。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I get many calls. / Im getting too many calls today.","zh":"我收到很多电话。/ 我今天收到太多电话了。"}]

meaning: 他跟谁都处得好。/ 他现在处得更好了。
examples_json: [{"en":"She gets along with her classmates. / Shes getting along well now.","zh":"她和同学处得好。/ 她现在处得很好。"}]
